creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Hungarian translation of the webpages are available:
http://gabor.t-hosting.hu/patches/hu.tgz

And the diff against www/en/Makefile:
http://gabor.t-hosting.hu/patches/Makefile.diff

Note, that this does not include the patch to link it
to the frontpage. I tested these sources locally, but I
would like to see if it works on the webserver
before linking it.
